title: Cpvp Mouse Place
description: Keyboard Place but instanly for the Mouse buttons
body:
# CpvpMousePlace

Removes the right-click and left-click delay. Hold your mouse button to place or attack with no delay.

## Features
- **Fast Right Click** – Zero-delay block placing & item usage.
- **Fast Left Click** – Zero-delay attacking & breaking.
- Configurable via **ModMenu**. No extra libraries needed.
- 100% client-side.
